label: Add a Missing Concept Node
description: Identify a concept that is referenced as a prerequisite or edge target but has no node definition. Create the node with all required fields.
output_type: PR adding a concept node to data/nodes/concepts.json

label: Add a Key Paper Node
description: Add a foundational research paper to data/nodes/papers.json with verified DOI/arXiv URL, authors, year, and edge connections to relevant concept or skill nodes.
output_type: PR adding a paper node to data/nodes/papers.json

label: Design a New Skill Path
description: Define a complete skill path within a domain: an ordered sequence of concept and skill nodes from beginner to advanced, with branching options.
output_type: PR adding a path object to data/domains/<domain>.json

label: Write a Reproducible Experiment Protocol
description: Write a fully specified experiment protocol for a skill node in the graph — hypothesis, setup, steps, expected outputs, and failure modes.
output_type: PR adding an experiment node to data/nodes/experiments.json

label: Expand the Space Builder Domain
description: The space-builder domain needs more concept nodes (chemical propulsion, electric propulsion, thermal control, link budget). Add at least three interconnected nodes.
output_type: PR adding 3+ nodes to data/nodes/concepts.json for domain-space-builder
